tagline: Read and type long texts at the same time.
landing_headline: Type through a book, one passage at a time.
landing_sub: Read by writing. Live per-character feedback on real public-domain books — nothing gamified. Just start; the passage below is already listening.
landing_hint: Start typing above · Backspace to fix · Esc restarts the passage
landing_feature_read_body: Books are split into passages of one short paragraph. Type one and you have read one.
landing_feature_tonal_body: Text fills in as you type. Colour appears only for a live mistake — never to celebrate.
landing_feature_guest_body: Everything is readable without an account. Sign in only to keep your progress and metrics.
library_sub: Every cover sits in the same frame — curated art and generated typographic covers alike.
summary_sign_in_prompt: Sign in to save your progress
